---
title: "GAMM toy build"
author: "Silpa Soni Nallacheruvu"
date: "2026-04-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
set.seed(42)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
pacman::p_load(mgcv, dplyr, readr)
library(readr)
library(mgcv)
library(dplyr)
```

## Load the simulated Data

```{r}
catss <- read.csv("../Data/simulated_data.csv")
```

## Check complete cases 

```{r}
print(paste("Number of complete cases:", sum(complete.cases(catss))))
```

# Build a GAMM Model

## Extract the data

```{r}
catss <- catss %>%
  mutate(SCZ18_sum = rowSums(select(., starts_with("SCZ18")), na.rm = TRUE))
catss <- catss %>%
  mutate(SUD15_sum = rowSums(select(., starts_with("SUD15")), na.rm = TRUE))
```

## Split the data into training and testing dataset 

Based on their twin_id

```{r}

```


## Fit the GAMM model

fit it on the training dataset

```{r}
gamm_model <- gam(SCZ18_sum ~ SUD15_var_1 + SUD15_var_2 + SUD15_var_3 + SUD15_var_4 + SUD15_var_5 + s(twin_id, bs="re"), 
                  data = catss,
                  family = gaussian(),
                  method = "REML")
```

```{r}
summary(gamm_model)
```


```{r}
plot(gamm_model, pages = 1)
```




```{r}
gamm_model_prs <- gam(SCZ18_sum ~ SUD15_var_1 + SUD15_var_2 + SUD15_var_3 + SUD15_var_4 + SUD15_var_5 + 
                    PRS_var_1 + PRS_var_2 + PRS_var_3 + PRS_var_4 + PRS_var_5 + PRS_var_6 + PRS_var_7 + PRS_var_8 + PRS_var_9 + PRS_var_10 + s(twin_id, bs="re"), 
                  data = catss,
                  family = gaussian(),
                  method = "REML")
summary(gamm_model_prs)
```


```{r}
gamm_model_prs <- gam(SCZ18_sum ~ SUD15_sum + 
                    PRS_var_1 + PRS_var_2 + PRS_var_3 + PRS_var_4 + PRS_var_5 + PRS_var_6 + PRS_var_7 + PRS_var_8 + PRS_var_9 + PRS_var_10 + s(twin_id, bs="re"), 
                  data = catss,
                  family = gaussian(),
                  method = "REML")
summary(gamm_model_prs)
```
